SBC News
2026-07-17

England’s devastating semi final defeat to a Lionel Messi-inspired Argentina means the 2026 World Cup final on Sunday will be contested between Argentina and Spain. And despite being the underdogs, it’s the South Americans who are clearly the punters’ favourites according to data from […]
